nasb.text: Let Pharaoh take action to appoint overseers in charge of the land, and let him exact a fifth of the produce of the land of Egypt in the seven years of abundance.

esv.text: Let Pharaoh proceed to appoint overseers over the land and take one-fifth of the produce of the land of Egypt during the seven plentiful years.

cnv.text: 法老要這樣行，在國中指派官員，當七年豐收的時候，徵收埃及地出產的五分之一。

ccb.text: 王也应该在各地委派官员，在七年丰收期内征收全国出产的五分之一，

csbs.text: 请法老付诸实施，指派监督们管理这地，在七个丰年中，征收埃及地收成的五分之一。
